title: TUZAZO 200pcs Mini Spatula for Cosmetics, Bulk Disposable Makeup Spatulas Mini Plastic Makeup Scoop Spatulas for Cosmetic Mixing and Sampling (Multi Colored with Storage Box)
description:
Perfect Tools for Beauty: You will get 200 count disposable makeup spatulas neatly storaged in a storage box; Bulk quantity with cute colors of pink, blue and purple, great for cosmetic small bussiness sales, skincare sample giveaway
Premium Small Spatula: Our mini cosmetic spatulas are made of food-grade PP plastic material, BPA free, quality thicken, washable and reusable
Proper Size: Mini makeup spatula measures approx. 2.2x0.5 inch and storage box measures 5.1x3.5x1.7 inch can hold all the skincare spatulas in the package for easy travel or daily storage
Skin-Friendly Surface: Plastic makeup spatula has smooth surface and does not hurt skin, suitable for sensitive skin, professional salon and family use
Easy to Use: Mini makeup scraper spoon shape design, effectively reduce waste and confusion, suitable for dispensing or applying your cream, gel, makeup, cosmetic, ointment, etc
reviews_5s: These mini “spatulas” are so useful. I have always been frustrated with moisturizers, serums and hair products that come in jars…having to “dig in” with your fingers is a messy business, and always wastes some product. These spatulas are sturdy and you can clean and resuse them. The color coding makes them perfect for reuse. Great value!These work great and love that they come in a storage boxGreat for testing productsI know these aren’t good for the environment but I keep buying them. I use them for scooping out my moisturizer. A must buy if you have nails for when using creams or lotions.I love these so I don't have to put my finger in my products and apply items to my skin. Very inexpensive and totally worth it. I hope you like it as much as I do. Enjoy!Nothing not to like! Very versatile! I use for makeup and applying foam Rogaine to my hair roots and eyebrows. Nothing has worked better for me! Sell on the Rogaine sites too! Will keep buying!These can be used with anything! I have sample sizes of skin care that these are used for. You can use these for rash creams for babies too. You could even use them for sample spoons if you wished.These mini spatulas are so convenient when you have long nails and digging in a jar ..I love using these! I put my face mask in a 1 oz jar when I travel and use these to scoop out exactly what I need without touching the product.El tamaño y la calidad de las paletitas me encantó
